title: React 19 Deep Dive
description: Learn the new React Compiler and Actions in this hands-on workshop.
longDescription: This masterclass covers the transition from React 18 to 19. We will explore the removal of forwardRef, the new 'use' hook, and how the compiler eliminates the need for manual memoization.

title: Global AI Summit
description: The biggest gathering of AI minds in Europe.
longDescription: A 3-day event featuring speakers from Google, OpenAI, and Meta. Topics include LLM optimization, ethical AI, and the future of generative agents in business.

title: Next.js Edge Days
description: Exploring edge computing and serverless architectures.
longDescription: Join the local community to discuss Vercel's latest edge runtime features. Networking and sushi included after the lightning talks.

title: Cyber Security Expo
description: Deep dive into zero-trust architecture and ethical hacking.
longDescription: Protect your infrastructure from modern threats. This workshop focuses on real-world penetration testing and hardening cloud environments.

title: Designer Meetup 2026
description: Discussing the intersection of UI design and mental health.
longDescription: A unique meetup focusing on how accessible design impacts user well-being. Includes a live Figma collaborative session.

title: Cloud Native DevFest
description: Mastering Kubernetes and Microservices at scale.
longDescription: The premier event for cloud engineers. We dive into Istio, Docker optimization, and running multi-region clusters.

title: Jazz in the Park
description: An evening of smooth jazz and networking.
longDescription: Relax after a long week of coding with some of the best jazz musicians in Paris. Open to all tech enthusiasts and music lovers.

title: HealthTech Innovation
description: AI-driven diagnostics and the future of medicine.
longDescription: A gathering of medical professionals and software engineers to build the next generation of healthcare tools.

title: The Coding Marathon
description: A 24-hour hackathon for the boldest developers.
longDescription: Build, break, and fix. Compete for prizes in categories like AI, Blockchain, and Sustainability.

title: Future of VR/AR
description: Step into the metaverse with industry leaders.
longDescription: Experience the latest hardware and software in spatial computing. Hands-on demos with the latest Vision Pro and Quest models.

longDescription: This masterclass covers the transition from React 18 to 19. We will explore the removal of forwardRef, the new 'use' hook, and how the compiler eliminates the need for manual memoization.
